SVC_FAST_PAIR.name: Fast Pair Service
SVC_FAST_PAIR.description: Google Fast Pair Provider GATT service (16‑bit UUID 0xFE2C). Holds Model ID, key-based pairing, passkey, account key, Additional Data, and (when implemented) Find Hub Network (FHN / FMDN) Beacon actions (0xFE2C…1238).

CHR_MODEL_ID.name: Model ID
CHR_MODEL_ID.description: Read-only 24‑bit Fast Pair model ID (uint24, octets 0–2, big-endian). Same value as discoverable Model ID advertisement.

CHR_KEY_BASED_PAIRING.name: Key-based Pairing
CHR_KEY_BASED_PAIRING.description: Write + notify. Encrypted request/response KBP procedure (anti-spoofing key or account key). Decrypted types include 0x00 key-based pairing request, 0x10 action request, 0x01 response.

CHR_PASSKEY.name: Passkey
CHR_PASSKEY.description: Write + notify. Encrypted passkey block; raw block message type 0x02 (Seeker) or 0x03 (Provider), 6‑digit passkey as uint32, salt padding.

CHR_ACCOUNT_KEY.name: Account Key
CHR_ACCOUNT_KEY.description: Write only. Seeker writes encrypted account key (uint128); Provider decrypts with pairing shared secret, validates 0x04 prefix, stores in bounded Account Key list.

CHR_ADDITIONAL_DATA.name: Additional Data (Data)
CHR_ADDITIONAL_DATA.description: Write + notify. After KBP handshake: data packet = 8‑byte HMAC‑SHA256 prefix + 8‑byte AES‑CTR nonce + ciphertext; raw payload Data ID 0x01 = personalized name (utf8s). Old 16‑bit 0x1237 target deprecated 2021/01/01.

CHR_BEACON_ACTIONS_FHN.name: Beacon actions (Find Hub Network / FMDN)
CHR_BEACON_ACTIONS_FHN.description: Find Hub Network (FHN) extension to Fast Pair — also referred to in Google docs as Find My Device Network (FMDN) for tracker-style accessories. Read + write + notify. Read returns protocol major (0x01) + 8‑byte one-time nonce; writes use HMAC‑authenticated requests for beacon provisioning (Data IDs 0x00–0x04), ringing (0x05–0x06), unwanted tracking protection (0x07–0x08), Precision Finding / ranging (0x0A–0x0D), etc. Spec: https://developers.google.com/nearby/fast-pair/specifications/extensions/fmdn

SVC_DEVICE_INFORMATION.name: Device Information Service
SVC_DEVICE_INFORMATION.description: Bluetooth SIG Device Information Service; Fast Pair recommends Firmware Revision characteristic for seekers.

CHR_FIRMWARE_REVISION.name: Firmware Revision
CHR_FIRMWARE_REVISION.description: Read utf8 firmware string. Spec allows status-updating / status-abnormal sentinel values; Provider should gate reads to bonded devices or discoverable state to reduce tracking.
